headline: EchoStar’s Spectrum Sales And New SpaceX Stake Reframe Investment Story
summary: EchoStar (NasdaqGS:SATS) has received FCC approval for major spectrum sales to SpaceX and AT&T. The transactions include cash proceeds and a sizeable equity stake in SpaceX as part of the consideration. Completion of these deals coincides with SpaceX's historic IPO, which now directly influences EchoStar's asset mix and valuation drivers. EchoStar's stock, NasdaqGS:SATS, closed at $114.08, with very large gains over the past year and past three years, and a strong move over five years. More...
